title: Open 20 April 2026 - Part 168
content: immense can leave behind a silence so complete.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    cried, trembled, celebrated with a fullness that and disbelief, trying to understand how a life so                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       home, he did not greet me—he unravelled. He since then, somewhere between movement                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              asks, but the kind that floods. When I returned fell. Not cracked—fell. And I have been standing                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    And then there was his love. Not the kind that of my being. And earlier this week, that column                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       funny, and tender.
